name: easyclaw
description: 跨平台 QEMU 虚拟机管理工具 - 支持 macOS 和 Windows
author: EasyClaw

scripts.check-image: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('resources/ubuntu-24.04-minimal-cloudimg-amd64-compressed.img')){console.error('请将 ubuntu-24.04-minimal-cloudimg-amd64-compressed.img (qcow2) 放入 resources/ 目录'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:main && node scripts/wait-port.js 5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.electron:build: npm run check-image && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run check-image && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run check-image && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:win-x64: npm run check-image && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
